Whether you’re a fresher, an Angular developer planning to switch, or someone preparing for frontend interviews — this series is for you.
Press enter or click to view image in full size

Non-member ? click here to read.
Why I Started This Series
Over the last few years, I’ve noticed something interesting.
Most React tutorials either:

• Jump directly into writing code.

• Assume you already know JavaScript deeply.

• Explain concepts without explaining why React works the way it does.
As a result, beginners become confused after learning only:

• Components

• Props

• State
Then suddenly they’re expected to understand:

• Hooks

• Context API

• Redux

• Routing

• Performance Optimization
without understanding the foundation.
This series solves that problem.
Who Should Read This?
This series is specially designed for:
